comment.body:
LISTEN!
Be careful.
I hedge upside via VIX.
If this closes above the market line, the squeeze will likely gonna be continued, and that will pull buying flows in. 
Today's meeting with Putin was promising for the investors along with Trump's shift in style. 
Into May OpEx window (with node of may 4-6 days risk is there for a further dip. After today, I doubt it will break down that big. But we will see. 
And that dip can be bought then with confidence already. 

In this environment on intraday basis, I like better fading on the put side, simply bcs premiums will have better convexity when profit takings occur.
But sentiment is started to stabilize today, after benign Witkoff/Putin meeting despite the assasination.
comment.raw_body:
LISTEN!
Be careful.
I hedge upside via VIX.
If this closes above the market line, the squeeze will likely gonna be continued, and that will pull buying flows in. 
Today's meeting with Putin was promising for the investors along with Trump's shift in style.

And that dip can be bought then with confidence already. 

In this environment on intraday basis, I like better fading on the put side, simply bcs premiums will have better convexity when profit takings occur.
But sentiment is started to stabilize today, after benign Witkoff/Putin meeting despite the assasination.

comment.body: Nvidia is considering establishing a China joint venture—“to preserve the CUDA ecosystem” and potentially spin off its Chinese operations into a separate entity. This reduces the risk of a single global entity being targeted in great-power tech competition, preserving Nvidia’s ability to serve both markets. It's a shield for its global business from the fallout of U.S.–China tensions.

comment.body:
be careful, bcs we can see during RTH positioning and news timings and liquidity datas that gov is actively managing the downside risk as said. 
a QE would be disastrous for the Fed now, they will do that only when deflation risk materializes through wealth effect. 
but gov has every tool along with Fed to push the market up and cap vol.
this is why i remain short vol. 
for upside delta trades i look for a better entry.
market is rangebounding. 
if so, they will need to give a dip soon.
